title: Thai Crispy Stuffed Leaves Rolls
description: A delicious Thai-inspired dish featuring crispy stuffed leaves rolls with a savory twist.

ingredients.name: stuffed
ingredients.notes: available in most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 1. Thaw the frozen spinach and squeeze out as much water as possible.
2. Mix cooked rice with peanut butter (if using) and set aside.
3. Pan-fry wontons in olive oil until crispy and golden brown.
4. Combine cooked rice mixture with pan-fried wontons.
5. Add the spinach to the mixture and stir until well combined.
6. Lay a spinach leaf flat and place a small amount of the rice mixture in the center.
7. Fold the leaf over the filling to form a roll and repeat with remaining leaves and filling.
8. Serve the crispy stuffed leaves rolls immediately, garnished with additional peanut butter if desired.
